commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an opencode Zen provider-catalog helper, wires dynamic model, catalog, and normalization hooks into the bundled opencode plugin, adds modelCatalog.runtimeAugment manifest metadata, and adds focused tests for hook activation.

PR surface: Source +179, Tests +133. Total +312 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current docs/onboarding configure opencode/claude-opus-4-6, current main lacks opencode dynamic/catalog hooks, and the resolver only falls back when provider config supplies a model or baseUrl. I did not run a live OpenCode call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer live proof and maintainer acceptance of the provider compatibility risk; there is no narrow automated repair remaining from this review.
